questionHtml: Suggest how the refracted rays in (a) are modified when the converging lens is replaced by a diverging lens.
markschemeHtml:
rays diverge after passing through lens

OR

the extension of the rays will intersect the principal axis on the side of incident rays/as if they were coming from the focal point/points in the left side/OWTTE ✔

meta.title: Suggest how the refracted rays in (a) are modified when the converging lens is replaced by a diverging lens.
